productDisplayName: Puma Unisex 917 Lo Green & White Shoes
description: Round toed green and white casual shoes with a canvas upper for extra durability and style Cotton knit tonal laces running through metallic eyelets for longer life and snug fit Canvas stylish side strips in contrast colour, synthetic rubber toe box for extra durability and protection of the forefoot Paneled heel guard for added durability and comfort with Puma branding embroidered Comfort insole with canvas tongue to ensure a snug, comfortable fit Textile lining for added comfort, made of high traction gum rubber, rubber toe guard strip with tonal sidewall trip Textured to suit the anatomy of the feet for maximum grip Reinforced heel with dip in back collar line to prevent Achilles tendon irritationWarranty: 3 months against manufactuting defectsWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
